name: Shrimp Boat
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat butter and olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Saute green onion, parsley, basil, oregano, and rosemary for 1 to 2 minutes until fragrant.
3. Add lemon juice to the pan and cook for another minute or until about 1/3 of the mixture remains.
4. Stir in ricotta cheese until well combined.
5. Place a Boboli shell on a baking sheet. Spoon the ricotta mixture into the center, leaving the edges uncovered.
6. Arrange artichoke hearts over the ricotta filling.
7. Scatter half of the sauteed onion mixture over the artichokes.
8. Arrange shrimp in a pinwheel design atop the artichokes and onion mixture.
9. Sprinkle remaining onion mixture over the shrimp.
10. Bake at 450°F for 5 to 7 minutes or until Boboli shells are crisp.
11. Garnish with parsley sprigs and lemon slices, if desired.
